titleStmt.title: SII 18.77: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 77. (B.K. No. 169-A of 1933-34.) HONAVĀḌ, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in front of the School.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Bhuvanaikamalladēva and is dated in Śaka 995, Pramādi, Vaiśākha, Pāḍiva, Thursday. The name of the paksha is lost. In the cyclic year Pramādi, in Vaiśākha, the Pratipadā fell on Thursday. But as it is stated that on this date the gift was made on account of an eclipse, the Pratipadā cited may be taken to be ba. 1, for, on the previous day, i.e., Pūrṇimā, a lunar eclipse occurred. In fact ba. Pratipadā commenced on Wednesday at ·55. The date would thus correspond to A.D. 1073, April 25, Thursday.

It registers a grant (details lost) made by Manevergaḍe, Daṇḍanāayaka Bhāskarabhaṭṭōpādhyāya, when he was administering the agrahāra Ponnavāḍa (modern Honavāḍ). He is described as the ārādhya of the king and is given the epithet ayyaṅgaḷ i.e., preceptor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāThis is written in
śraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābha
raṇaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvara vijayarājyamutta
rōttarābhivriddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salu
ttamire tadārādhyar svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmaṁtādhi
pati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ vibudhavaradāyakaṁ satyaratnākaraṁ
vipradivākaraṁ nītipārāyaṇaṁ sauryyanārāyaṇaṁ vāṇarāyapra
mukhānēkacōḷasāmantakarikalabhakaṇṭhīravaṁ raṇaraṁgabhairavanubhayabaḷa
subhaṭakīrttitapratāpaṁ vairisantāpaṁ pārvvatīvallabhasarasīru
habhṛṁgaṁ mahāmahimōttuṁgaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvarārādhya
rappa śrimadayyaṁgaḷmaneverggaḍe daṇḍanāyakaṁ bhāskarabha
ṭṭōpādhyāyar . Uttamamagrahāraṁ ponnavāḍamaṁ tribhōgābhyaṁ
tarasiddhiyiṁdāḷuttamire voḍeveṭṭada palavuṁ devasadappayaṇa
vīḍinoḷ . sakavarṣa 995 neya pramādisaṁvatsarada vaiśākha
pāḍiva bṛhaspativāra grahaṇanimittadiṁ
dēvargge khaṇḍasbhuṭita
tadindalliya pūrvva The continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 18.77 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
